nodes.title: List Journal Entries
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries with Authorization header. Supports query params: dateFrom, dateTo, page, limit, categoryId. Returns paginated array of journal entries with {id, entryNumber, date, description, totalDebit, totalCredit, isBalanced, lines[], categoryId}.

nodes.title: Validate Journal Entry
nodes.description: Validates journal entry payload. Checks: operationTypeId is required (returns 400 'معرّف نوع العملية (القالب) مطلوب'), lines array must have at least 2 entries, each line must have accountId and either debit or credit > 0. Computes totalDebit and totalCredit, sets isBalanced flag.

nodes.title: Create Journal Entry
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries with {date, description, operationTypeId, categoryId?, lines: [{accountId, debit, credit, description}]}. Generates sequential entry number, creates entry with computed totals and balance flag. Returns created entry.

nodes.title: Update Journal Entry
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries/:id with {date?, description?, lines?[]}. Updates entry fields and recalculates totals if lines changed. Returns updated entry.

nodes.title: Delete Journal Entry
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries/:id. Removes journal entry and all its lines. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.
